ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frequency_bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency band */,
  "band" INTEGER /* Band number */,
  "band_start" INTEGER /* Start point of the frequency band */,
  "band_end" INTEGER /* End point of the frequency band */,
  "guard_start" REAL /* Start point of the guard band */,
  "guard_end" REAL /* End point of the guard band */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of frequency band (e.g., FDD, TDD) */,
  "downlink" TEXT /* Downlink status (e.g., U, L) */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Wireless technology used (e.g., 4G, 5G, Wi-Fi) */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the frequency band */,
  "usage" TEXT /* Typical usage of the band (e.g., cellular, satellite, IoT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's central point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's central point */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional allocation */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency band */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the allocation was made */,
  "frequency_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency type */,
  "downlink_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the downlink status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_allocations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_allocations_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES frequency_bands ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_allocations_frequency_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_type_id") REFERENCES frequency_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_allocations_downlink_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("downlink_status_id") REFERENCES downlink_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the operator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the operator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the operator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency band */,
  "license_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "frequency_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency type */,
  "downlink_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the downlink status */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the license (e.g., active, expired, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES frequency_bands ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_downlink_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("downlink_status_id") REFERENCES downlink_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_frequency_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_type_id") REFERENCES frequency_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, operator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the frequency band */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency band */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the frequency band was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES frequency_bands ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency type */,
  "max_bandwidth" REAL /* Maximum bandwidth supported by the frequency type */,
  "min_bandwidth" REAL /* Minimum bandwidth supported by the frequency type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downlink_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each downlink status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the downlink status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the downlink status */,
  "is_uplink" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the status is for uplink */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
